title: ACOFUSION Photometric Comparison PRO
dragText: Drag one or more IES / LDT files here
dragSub: Multi-file import with automatic photometric analysis
searchPlaceholder: Search file or beam type (e.g. Wallwash, 15D)...
proDesc: Adjust mounting height, Tilt and Rotation for a quick footprint, offset and relative illuminance preview; not a DIALux / Relux room calculation.
aimingEmpty: Load a photometric file to preview aiming values.
reportSubtitle: IES / LDT Photometric Data with Indicative Aiming Preview
tableSub: Indicative selection preview; not a project-level illuminance calculation
compSub: Compare multiple IES / LDT files for specifier selection and application review
noComparison: No files selected for comparison. Enable Compare in the IES / LDT file list.
compareTooltip: Add / remove this file from the comparison matrix
auditTitle: IES / LDT Photometric Audit & Anomaly Detection
auditSub: Checks file integrity, naming consistency, wattage, beam type and export risks before specification use
auditPass: All loaded IES / LDT photometric files passed the current integrity and consistency checks.
aimingSummaryNote: Axis E uses peak candela and aiming geometry as an indicative value. Use project software for formal illuminance verification.
noFilesZip: No files in the list. ZIP export is unavailable.
noComparisonZip: No files are included in the comparison set.
comparisonZipDone: Comparison Set ZIP download is ready.
fullZipDone: Full ZIP package download is ready.
importSuccess: Import complete: {loaded} IES / LDT file(s) added or updated{skipped}.
importNone: No files imported. Only .ies and .ldt are supported.
removedCompare: Removed from comparison set. The file remains in the list.
aimingReset: Aiming preview reset to H 5.0m / Tilt 0° / Rotation 0°.
useWallwash: Vertical surfaces, wallwashing and large display walls
useOval: Linear objects, corridors, retail shelving and sculpture accent lighting
useSymNarrow: Very narrow beam, high ceiling or high-intensity accent lighting
useSymMedium: Museums, galleries and premium retail accent lighting
useSymWide: General low-glare downlighting and task-area support
exportTabDesc: Export original IES / LDT files, CSV summary, audit data, polar images and scope README.
aimingTabDesc: Indicative selection preview only. Not a project-level room simulation.
scopeNote: This tool supports photometric comparison, audit, selection support, aiming preview and data package export. It is not DIALux, Relux, AGi32, formal UGR software, EN 12464-1 compliance software or full room simulation software.
auditEmpty: No files have been imported, or no data warnings are currently detected.
note.glareRisk: This is an indicative risk prompt based on beam angle, peak candela, mounting height and aiming angle. It is not a formal CIE 117 / EN 12464-1 UGR calculation.
report.aimingNote: Aiming values are indicative and not a project-level lighting calculation.
report.exportPurpose: This export is for photometric comparison and specification review, not project-level room calculation.
readme.scopeMatrix: Sortable comparison matrix with optional column visibility
readme.scopeExport: Polar curve, CBCP, FWHM, flux, efficacy and audit export
readme.limitSoftware: This tool is not DIALux, Relux, AGi32 or Radiance.
readme.limitAiming: Aiming / footprint preview is indicative only and is not a project-level illuminance simulation.
readme.limitGlare: Glare risk is indicative only and is not a formal CIE 117 / EN 12464-1 UGR calculation.
readme.limitColour: Declared colour data is taken from filename / metadata / manual input. TM-30, R9 and R15 require manufacturer data or SPD input and are not calculated here.
parser.iesAngleCountsPositive: IES angle counts must be positive
parser.ldtTooShort: LDT file is too short or incomplete
warning.verticalAngleCount: {fmt} vertical angle count does not match the declared value.
warning.horizontalAngleCount: {fmt} horizontal angle count does not match the declared value.
warning.matrixHorizontalCount: {fmt} candela matrix horizontal row count does not match the declared value.
warning.matrixVerticalCount: {fmt} candela matrix row {row} has an inconsistent vertical angle count.
warning.peakIntensity: {fmt} peak candela is invalid or zero.
warning.totalFlux: {fmt} calculated total flux is invalid or zero.
warning.inputWatts: {fmt} input watts are missing or zero; efficacy will use a fallback calculation.
warning.horizontalAngleOrder: {fmt} horizontal angles are not in ascending order, which may affect curve rendering and integration.
warning.verticalAngleOrder: {fmt} vertical angles are not in ascending order, which may affect curve rendering and integration.
warning.horizontalCoverage: {fmt} horizontal angle coverage is not a common 0/90/180/360-degree range; total flux integration may require manual checking.
warning.nearfieldPresent: {fmt} contains NEARFIELD metadata; this tool remains focused on far-field photometric comparison.
warning.colourCctMissing: CCT was not found in filename or metadata; colour field shows N/A. Confirm with manufacturer data.
warning.colourCriMissing: CRI/Ra was not found in filename or metadata; colour field shows N/A. Confirm with manufacturer data.
audit.wallwashMismatchDesc: The file name includes Wallwash, but the measured photometric peak angle, tilt offset or distribution symmetry suggests a symmetric distribution. This may lead to incorrect wallwashing expectations or incorrect files being sent to customers.
audit.ovalMismatchDesc: The file name includes Oval, but the FWHM C0/C90 ratio is close to symmetrical. Please confirm whether a symmetric lens was tested with an oval file name.
audit.wattageMismatchDesc: The file name indicates {parsedW}W, but the IES registered wattage is {expectedW}W. If the registered value is inaccurate, the specification may contain conflicting declared data.
audit.lowFluxDesc: The calculated luminous flux is below 50 lm. Check whether a multiplier is missing, the tested source is severely degraded, or the IES file contains empty data.
comparison.emptyInstruction: Use Compare ON/OFF in the file list.
comparison.emptyLegend: No files are selected for comparison. Enable Compare in the IES / LDT file list.
warning.fluxDeclaredDiff: Calculated flux ({calculated} lm) differs from declared lamp flux ({declared} lm) by more than 25%; check multiplier, LOR, near-field data or file units.
